title: Brixpansion
description: A Minecraft Forge mod that introduces 50+ new vanilla-inspired blocks!
body:
From the creator of SoniCraft and Village Employment comes a brand-new mod to satisfy all of your building needs. Introducing...

![](https://i.postimg.cc/CLtMStbF/Brixpansion-Logo.png)

Now, I know that there several different mods like this one out there, but half of them are for Fabric (and no, I do not have plans to port this to Fabric, so please don't ask), and I wanted to give you guys more options when it comes to decorating your base. In fact, I strongly encourage you guys to mix-and-match the various blocks in Brixpansion with blocks from other mods like Quark or Builder's Delight! The blocks provided in Brixpansion are just how I personally think said blocks would look in vanilla Minecraft. That being said, here's a full list of what I've got so far.

 

All Blocks Added:

- Stone Brick Pillar
- Nether Brick Pillar
- Red Nether Brick Fence
- Cracked Red Nether Bricks
- Chiseled Red Nether Bricks
- Red Nether Brick Pillar
- Cracked Prismarine Bricks
- Chiseled Prismarine Bricks
- Prismarine Brick Pillar
- Cracked End Stone Bricks
- Chiseled End Stone Bricks
- End Stone Brick Pillar
- Cracked Purpur Block
- Chiseled Purpur Block
- Granite Bricks (Base Block, Stairs, Slab, Wall, Cracked, Chiseled, and Pillar)
- Diorite Bricks (Base Block, Stairs, Slab, Wall, Cracked, Chiseled, and Pillar)
- Andesite Bricks (Base Block, Stairs, Slab, Wall, Cracked, Chiseled, and Pillar)
- Basalt Bricks (Base Block, Stairs, Slab, Wall, Cracked, Chiseled, and Pillar)
- Tuff Bricks (Base Block, Stairs, Slab, Wall, Cracked, Chiseled, and Pillar)
- Calcite Bricks (Base Block, Stairs, Slab, Wall, Cracked, Chiseled, and Pillar)
- Dripstone Bricks (Base Block, Stairs, Slab, Wall, Cracked, Chiseled, and Pillar)
- Obsidian Bricks (Base Block, Stairs, Slab, Wall, Cracked, Chiseled, and Pillar)
- Amethyst Bricks (Base Block, Stairs, Slab, Wall, Cracked, Chiseled, and Pillar)
- Cut Coal (Base Block, Stairs, and Slab)
- Cut Iron (Base Block, Stairs, and Slab)
- Cut Gold (Base Block, Stairs, and Slab)
- Cut Redstone (Base Block, Stairs, and Slab)
- Cut Emerald (Base Block, Stairs, and Slab)
- Cut Lapis (Base Block, Stairs, and Slab)
- Cut Diamond (Base Block, Stairs, and Slab)
- Cut Netherite (Base Block, Stairs, and Slab)

 

If you count all of the non-solid blocks and extra variants, it all adds up to over 50 different blocks you can choose from!

 

![](https://i.postimg.cc/L5K31RYm/2022-01-16-17-15-16.png)

 

I'm sure more blocks will be added in the future, so stay tuned! In fact, feel free to come chat with me on [my Discord server](https://discord.gg/rggdttb2Xs), and let me know what kind of blocks *you* would like to see get added!
